testsuite.name: it.unige.portcommand.nlp.ManualSmokeScratch
testsuite.system-out: === LLM SMOKE === isReady=true elapsed_ms=10457 validated=false text=The harbour master should accept the 2000 EUR offer for 5 hours at berth 3 because it represents a fair and competitive price for the services offered. Additionally, accepting the offer would help maintain good relations with the customer and possibly attract repeat business or referrals. === RASA SMOKE === elapsed_ms=50 intent=propose_offer confidence=1.0 entities={price_expression=EntityHit[entity=price_expression, value=2000, start=16, end=20], berth_id=EntityHit[entity=berth_id, value=berth_3, start=36, end=43], time_expression=EntityHit[entity=time_expression, value=5 hours, start=25, end=32]}
